```kotlin
fun solve(points: Array<Array<Long>>): Long {
    val MOD = 1000000007L
    val inv2 = 500000004L

    val yCount = HashMap<Long, Int>()
    for (p in points) {
        val y = p[1]
        yCount[y] = yCount.getOrDefault(y, 0) + 1
    }

    var sumC = 0L
    var sumSq = 0L

    for ((y, cnt) in yCount) {
        val term = (cnt * (cnt - 1) % MOD) * inv2 % MOD
        sumC = (sumC + term) % MOD
        val termSq = (term * term) % MOD
        sumSq = (sumSq + termSq) % MOD
    }

    val temp = (sumC * sumC - sumSq) % MOD
    val ans = (temp * inv2) % MOD
    return ans
}
```
